Hero.title: Build Your Future
Hero.subtitle: Get an internationally recognized EU degree with affordable tuition fees. We handle your application, visa, and housing from start to finish.

WhyBulgaria.title: Why Choose Bulgaria?
WhyBulgaria.intro: Bulgaria offers an excellent higher education system that follows European standards and provides internationally recognized diplomas.
WhyBulgaria.card1Desc: Significantly lower tuition costs compared to Western Europe — high-quality education without the high price tag.
WhyBulgaria.card2Desc: Degrees are fully recognized across the European Union and internationally, opening doors worldwide.
WhyBulgaria.card3Desc: A welcoming community of international students from over 50 countries creates a truly global campus experience.
WhyBulgaria.card4Desc: Daily expenses, accommodation, and transport are substantially lower than in most EU countries.
WhyBulgaria.card5Desc: State-of-the-art facilities, research centers, and well-equipped laboratories across all major institutions.
WhyBulgaria.card6Desc: Located in Southeastern Europe with excellent connectivity to the rest of the continent.

HigherEducation.title: Higher Education System
HigherEducation.subtitle: Bulgaria's higher education follows the Bologna Process, ensuring compatibility with all European systems.
HigherEducation.bachelorDesc: Provides students with fundamental academic knowledge and professional skills in their chosen field.
HigherEducation.masterDesc: Deepens specialization and prepares graduates for advanced professional or research careers.
HigherEducation.phdDesc: The highest academic qualification, focused on original research and contribution to knowledge.
HigherEducation.type1: Universities — offering all three degree levels across multiple disciplines
HigherEducation.type2: Specialized Institutions — focused on medicine, technology, arts, or economics
HigherEducation.type3: Colleges — shorter professional programs leading to associate degrees

Benefits.title: Benefits & Opportunities
Benefits.subtitle: International students in Bulgaria enjoy a wide range of academic and professional advantages.
Benefits.b1Desc: Students are legally permitted to work part-time, supporting themselves during studies.
Benefits.b2Desc: Strong university-industry partnerships provide practical internship opportunities in your field.
Benefits.b3Desc: Programs taught in English, French, German, and Bulgarian to suit international students.
Benefits.b4Desc: Vibrant student clubs, cultural festivals, sports, and social events throughout the year.
Benefits.b5Desc: An EU-recognized diploma opens the door to careers across all 27 EU member states.
Benefits.b6Desc: Access to semester exchanges and scholarship grants at universities across Europe.

Programs.title: Top Study Programs
Programs.subtitle: Bulgaria's universities excel in a wide range of fields recognized across Europe and beyond.
Programs.p1Desc: Highly reputable medical programs with European recognition. Graduates practice across the EU and internationally.
Programs.p2Desc: Software development, AI, robotics, and telecommunications — preparing graduates for high-demand tech careers.
Programs.p3Desc: Internationally oriented programs in management, finance, and international business with strong EU recognition.
Programs.p4Desc: Industry-aligned programs in hotel management, culinary arts, and tourism in one of Europe's growing markets.

HowToApply.title: How to Apply?
HowToApply.subtitle: Our team handles every step of your application — from document preparation to visa approval.
HowToApply.step1Desc: Secondary school diploma, transcripts, passport copy, health certificate, and language proficiency proof.
HowToApply.step2Desc: Fill in university application forms with our guidance. We ensure all requirements are met precisely.
HowToApply.step3Desc: Demonstrate proficiency in the language of instruction. We assist with preparation if needed.
HowToApply.step4Desc: Some programs (especially medicine) require entrance exams. We provide full preparation support.
HowToApply.step5Desc: Non-EU students apply for a student visa. Our team prepares and guides you through the entire process.
HowToApply.step6Desc: We coordinate your arrival, accommodation, and university registration so you can focus on studying.
HowToApply.late: Late Applications: Some universities accept until August – September

Tuition.title: Tuition & Living Costs
Tuition.subtitle: Study in Europe without breaking the bank. Bulgaria offers exceptional value for international students.

StudentLife.title: Student Life & Adaptation
StudentLife.subtitle: Bulgaria offers a rich, affordable, and welcoming environment for international students.
StudentLife.transportDesc: International students are eligible for up to 70% discounts on public transport passes in Bulgarian cities.
StudentLife.erasmusDesc: Participate in semester exchanges at universities across Europe with scholarship support through Erasmus+.
StudentLife.jobsDesc: Part-time work opportunities in hospitality, IT, and services. University career centers support internship placement.
StudentLife.cultureDesc: Student clubs, cultural festivals, sports facilities, and a diverse international community await you in Bulgaria.

Universities.title: Explore Universities
Universities.subtitle: Choose from Bulgaria's leading institutions across multiple cities and disciplines.

CTA.title: Ready to Start Your Journey?
CTA.desc: Our experts handle all the bureaucracy while you focus on your future. Get a free consultation today.

Metadata.title: Study Abroad EU - Your Gateway to European Education
Metadata.description: Discover affordable and high-quality education in Bulgaria with Study Abroad EU. We assist international students in applying to top Bulgarian universities, handling everything from application to visa and housing.
